name: ce-drive-web
description: CE Drive web app — the open-source Google Drive UI over CE primitives. Framework-free TypeScript + Vite. File browser over a DriveTree (Kleppmann move-CRDT) model, chunked CID-verified upload/download via @ce-net/sdk, capability-based sharing.
author: Leif Rydenfalk <ledamecrydenfalk@gmail.com>

scripts.build:wasm: wasm-pack build --target web --release --out-dir "$PWD/src/wasm" --out-name ce_drive_wasm ../ce-drive/crates/ce-drive-wasm && rm -f src/wasm/.gitignore src/wasm/package.json src/wasm/README.md
